episodes.title: Religious Trauma in the Black Community with Nikki G & Jonathon Carrington
episodes.description: Joining me are Nikki G and Jonathon Carrington, the two co-hosts of the Surviving the Black Church Podcast and founders of the Black Religious Trauma Recovery Network. We have a great conversation about the unique experiences black survivors of religious trauma and Christian Nationalism and how to start recognizing and healing from it. Learn more about Nikki and Jonathon's work: Surviving the Black Church Podcast Black Religious Trauma Recovery Network @survivingtheblackchurch
